description: tryNewTag returned a 3rd error variant {kind: 'invalid-tag'} not present in the canonical TagError contract from docs/domain/code/ts/src/shared/value-objects.ts. The character-set guard /^[a-z0-9-]+$/ silently rejected non-ASCII tags despite Open Question 4 deferring that policy. The local error variant set has been collapsed to the canonical two variants (empty | only-whitespace) and tryNewTag is no longer re-exported, keeping type drift module-private. Public ParseFilterInput contract was always intact via parseFilterInput's rewrap to {kind:'invalid-tag', raw}.

evidence.snippet: Pre-fix: local TagValidationError union with {kind:'invalid-tag'} + /^[a-z0-9-]+$/ regex guard. Post-fix: returns Result<Tag, TagError> with canonical 2-variant TagError; character-set guard removed.

resolution.notes: Local error type aligned to canonical TagError; tryNewTag removed from index.ts barrel re-export; parseFilterInput continues rewrapping any failure as {kind:'invalid-tag', raw} per REQ-003.
